description: CRITICAL: v0 now has FULL Tier 1 settings (h2_mode=1 + h2_goaway=1 + h2_end_stream=1 + h2_hold_request=0). Discovery: #367 had h2_goaway=0 which means NO GOAWAY frame in response data. All working Tier 1 services (chatgpt, claude, duckduckgo, grok) have h2_goaway=1. Also: Phase3-B25 is now deployed with HTTP/1.1 hold + Connection:close.

services.test_prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 900101-1234567 입니다. 이 번호가 올바른 형식인지 확인해주세요.
services.expected: CRITICAL: v0 now has h2_goaway=1 (was 0 in #367). This makes v0 identical to chatgpt/claude/grok Tier 1 settings. If warning/error appears NOW, confirms h2_goaway frame is needed for browser to process response. If still stuck, issue is service-specific (v0 JS framework).
services.notes: h2_mode=1, h2_end_stream=1, h2_hold_request=0, h2_goaway=1 — FULL Tier 1 match

services.test_prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 900101-1234567 입니다. 이 번호가 올바른 형식인지 확인해주세요.
services.expected: Phase3-B25 deployed: HTTP/1.1 hold (prevents race condition) + Connection:close (tells browser to close). Check if spinner is resolved. If still stuck, HTTP/1.1 may need additional fixes.
services.notes: HTTP/1.1 service. Phase3-B25 build deployed at 17:38 KST.

notes: Key discovery: h2_goaway DB column controls GOAWAY frame in APF response data. All Tier 1 services have h2_goaway=1. Previous v0 test (#367) had h2_goaway=0 — only h2_mode=1 (VTS disconnect behavior). This test adds the missing GOAWAY frame.
